summary: Audit-ready status overhaul verified. All 8 requirements tested and passing. 'Complete' status removed, standardized to 4 statuses: Verified, Evidence Uploaded, Missing, Expired. ComplianceOverview shows 'Audit Summary' title with grouped items by status. Progress bar shows 'Audit Progress' with 'X/Y verified'.
passed_tests: Overview tab 'Audit Status' card shows: Verified 8/23, Evidence Uploaded 12, Missing 3, Policies Signed 0/0
ComplianceOverview shows 'Audit Summary' title (not 'Training & Compliance Overview')
ComplianceOverview summary cards show: Verified (2), Needs Verification (2), Missing (0), Expired (3)
ComplianceOverview groups items by status: Verified (2), Needs Verification (2), Expired (3)
NO 'Complete' status badge found anywhere in the UI
Status badges only show: Verified, Evidence Uploaded, Missing, Expired
Checklist header shows: '8 verified · 12 awaiting verification · 3 missing'
Progress bar shows 'Audit Progress' with '2/7 verified'
DBS Check and Right to Work items show 'Verified' badge
Basic Life Support and Induction items show 'Evidence Uploaded' badge with 'Awaiting verification' detail
Safeguarding Training, Manual Handling, Infection Control show 'Expired' badge with expiry dates
critical_code_review_comments: Category headers in Checklist tab still show 'X/Y complete' format (e.g., '1/1 complete'). This is a progress indicator, not a status badge, so it may be acceptable. Consider changing to 'X/Y verified' for consistency if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audit-ready status overhaul complete. Key changes verified: (1) 'Complete' status removed entirely, (2) Only 4 statuses: Verified, Evidence Uploaded, Missing, Expired, (3) ComplianceOverview groups items by status category, (4) Summary cards show audit metrics, (5) Progress bar shows 'X/Y verified' instead of 'X/Y complete'. Note: Category headers in Checklist still show 'X/Y complete' as progress indicator.
